calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-09-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Dept. 501 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288
Daniel Cheung, Esq. for the Plaintiff: Trinity Management Services.
Plaintiff's Witness Jacky Lopez was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant Melinda Stube.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 888 O'Farrell Street #W0802, San Francisco, San Francisco, CA. 94109.
Back-due rent $2274.00
Holdover damages $2956.20
The Lease is forfeited.
Attoreny fees and costs per motion.
Judgment was submitted and signed.

UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Oct-09-2012 Assigned To Trial Court
